summary: Correlated the strongest in-scope branch to a 2026-03-26 10:19-10:20 EDT configuration broadcast ripple with nearby FireFlow authentication and user bootstrap, not a proven approval/review/implementation state transition. Microservice logs show application-afaConfig.properties change broadcasts, Apache shows the matching /config/ms-* fan-out and nearby CommandsDispatcher/authentication calls, FireFlow shows Authentication:authenticateUser and User:GetUserInfo, PostgreSQL shows same-minute rt3 client resets, and /opt/activemq contains no broker files for direct store/log confirmation.
follow_up_recommendations: Pivot to a minute containing a FireFlow ticket identifier or a dispatcher target other than UserSession, Authentication, or User to capture a true request-progression branch.
If allowed in a later tier, inspect additional broker/runtime locations because /opt/activemq is empty on this appliance slice and cannot confirm broker-side persistence.
